---
id: architecture-diagram-pipeline
sidebar_label: "🏗️ Architecture Diagram"
title: "Architecture Diagrams — DocSlide AI Pipeline"
---

import { ArchitectureDiagram } from '@site/src/components/PageLayouts/wave6';

<ArchitectureDiagram
  title="4-Phase Pipeline — High-Level Flowchart"
  description="End-to-end flow from Docusaurus Generate Slides button click through all four pipeline phases to Slidev presentation output."
  diagramType="flowchart"
  owner="varun.pritham"
  lastUpdated="2026-06-01"
  sourceFile="docs/diagrams/pipeline-flowchart.mmd"
  repoUrl="https://gitlab.internal.barclays.com/ai-platform/docslide-ai"
  mermaid={`flowchart TD
    A([🖱️ Docusaurus Button Click]) --> B[POST /generate\nFastAPI :8000]
    B --> C{url_path_to_file}
    C --> D[.mdx file on disk]

    D --> E[Phase 1: Extraction\n5 agents — Blackboard pattern]
    E --> E1[mdx_file_reader]
    E1 --> E2[mdx_cleaner]
    E2 --> E3[text_extractor]
    E3 --> E4[attachment_resolver]
    E4 --> E5[attachment_embed_agent]

    E5 --> F[Phase 2: Content\n4 agents — Agent Router]
    F --> F1[content_chunker]
    F1 --> F2[content_type_classifier\n🤖 LLM]
    F2 --> F3[prose_condenser\n🤖 LLM]
    F3 --> F4[speaker_notes_writer\n🤖 LLM]

    F4 --> G[Phase 3: Design\n5 agents — Tool Routing]
    G --> G1[layout_selector]
    G1 --> G2[code_slide_agent]
    G2 --> G3[section_break_agent]
    G3 --> G4[transition_agent]
    G4 --> G5[pacing_agent]

    G5 --> H[Phase 4: Assembly\n4 agents]
    H --> H1[frontmatter_generator]
    H1 --> H2[summary_slide_agent\n🤖 LLM]
    H2 --> H3[slide_assembler]
    H3 --> H4[validator_agent]

    H4 --> I[output/slides/page.md]
    I --> J[npx slidev :3030]
    J --> K([🎯 Browser opens Slidev])`}
/>

---

<ArchitectureDiagram
  title="/generate Request Sequence"
  description="Sequence diagram showing interactions between the browser, FastAPI server, LangGraph pipeline, Anthropic API, and Slidev during a single slide generation request."
  diagramType="sequence"
  owner="james.liu"
  lastUpdated="2026-05-28"
  sourceFile="docs/diagrams/pipeline-sequence.mmd"
  repoUrl="https://gitlab.internal.barclays.com/ai-platform/docslide-ai"
  mermaid={`sequenceDiagram
    participant B as Browser
    participant F as FastAPI :8000
    participant L as LangGraph Pipeline
    participant A as Anthropic API
    participant S as Slidev :3030

    B->>F: POST /generate {url_path}
    F->>F: url_path_to_file()
    F->>L: compiled.invoke(initial_state)

    rect rgb(240, 249, 255)
        note over L: Phase 1 — Extraction (5 agents, no LLM)
        L->>L: mdx_file_reader → mdx_cleaner → text_extractor
        L->>L: attachment_resolver → attachment_embed_agent
    end

    rect rgb(240, 253, 244)
        note over L,A: Phase 2 — Content (4 agents, 3 LLM calls)
        L->>L: content_chunker
        L->>A: classify chunk types (content_type_classifier)
        A-->>L: prose/code/image/table/list/heading_only
        L->>A: condense long prose (prose_condenser)
        A-->>L: bullet-point summaries
        L->>A: write speaker notes (speaker_notes_writer)
        A-->>L: presenter notes per slide
    end

    rect rgb(255, 251, 235)
        note over L: Phase 3 — Design (5 agents, no LLM)
        L->>L: layout_selector → code_slide_agent
        L->>L: section_break_agent → transition_agent → pacing_agent
    end

    rect rgb(253, 242, 248)
        note over L,A: Phase 4 — Assembly (4 agents, 1 LLM call)
        L->>L: frontmatter_generator
        L->>A: write key takeaways (summary_slide_agent)
        A-->>L: closing summary slide
        L->>L: slide_assembler → validator_agent
    end

    L-->>F: {output_path, slides, validation_errors}
    F->>S: kill :3030 + npx slidev slides.md
    S-->>F: listening on :3030
    F-->>B: {slides_url, slide_count, errors}`}
/>
